query:
ALTER TABLE `stores` 
  ADD COLUMN `platform` enum('shopify','woocommerce','amazon','etsy','ebay','tiktok_shop','walmart') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'shopify' AFTER `name`,
  ADD COLUMN `platformDomain` varchar(255) AFTER `platform`,
  ADD COLUMN `platformAccessToken` text AFTER `platformDomain`,
  ADD COLUMN `platformStoreId` varchar(255) AFTER `platformAccessToken`,
  DROP COLUMN `shopifyDomain`,
  DROP COLUMN `shopifyAccessToken`;
